series_metadata.series_title: Bureau of Sentence Computation Legal File
series_metadata.series_description: An accurate and complete record pertaining to the calculation of an inmate''s sentence which includes copies of official court documents and any other related papers created to document the time an inmae is required to serve with the Department of Rehabilitation and Correction.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: ten years death, final release, maximum expiration or definite sentence expiration
